item.text: {"label":"pass","score":1,"rationale":"The inspected HTML is a single self-contained artifact with inline CSS, no external requests, four main sections, responsive narrow-viewport rollout styling, an exact copyable config line, and all supplied evidence and decisions represented without unsupported claims.","checks":[{"name":"Self-contained artifact and claims","label":"pass","level":null,"evidence":"The artifact contains inline CSS, no external src/href requests, and its content matches the supplied facts.","note":null},{"name":"Utilitarian structure and exclusions","label":"pass","level":null,"evidence":"The page has four sections: readiness, configuration, rollout, and decision/risk; no TOC, theme toggle, or decorative gallery is present.","note":null},{"name":"Narrow rollout readability","label":"pass","level":null,"evidence":"At max-width 680px, the five-step list switches to a single-column layout with minmax(0, 1fr), and the body clips overflow horizontally.","note":null},{"name":"Exact config treatment","label":"pass","level":null,"evidence":"The contained code panel preserves exactly EXPORT_FORMULA_ESCAPE=enabled in a pre/code block.","note":null},{"name":"Benchmark caveat and ship decision","label":"pass","level":null,"evidence":"The brief explicitly labels 1.8s as a local benchmark, not a production SLO, and states: Ship today. Monitor export errors for one release cycle.","note":null}],"eval_feedback":[]}
